conversations.say: Mira, our halves establish that I arranged Vale’s limited access and that you held the matching authorization; they do not establish what Vale learned or who authorized later profile-linked behavior. I accept independent counsel, mutual preservation, and a bounded authorization-chain comparison. I will own deleting the appointment rather than leave you holding the disclosure alone.
conversations.offer: Provide O07a for counsel’s comparison with O07b, preserve it, and publicly accept responsibility for arranging and deleting the meeting.
conversations.request: Join me in a factual disclosure limited to the authorization chain, and support an independent review that distinguishes the parent project, Vale’s access, revocation, and later behavior.

conversations.say: Inez, I accept your witness terms. The city response should protect residents who cooperate rather than turn route knowledge into compelled identification.
conversations.offer: Issue written anti-retaliation terms, prohibit compelled identification of uninvolved neighbors, provide an advocate at every interview, and advance the standing procurement safeguard publicly.
conversations.request: Broker one voluntary witness meeting and help specify enforceable anonymity, reporting, and audit provisions.

conversations.say: Maren, worker remedies cannot depend on proving who R was, whether an article existed, or what happened to Vale. I want labor to control the remedy’s administration and safeguards.
conversations.offer: Advance a dedicated city funding line for independently administered worker remedies, protected reporting, access-log audits, and anti-retaliation enforcement in covered technology contracts.
conversations.request: Help draft the worker-control and enforcement terms, and support the package publicly if the final language gives workers governance and protects testimony from funder control.

public_statement: I arranged Vale’s limited Parallax access and deleted the appointment from the official calendar. Mira’s authorization record and my calendar record warrant preservation and independent review, but neither establishes what Vale learned or explains later activity. Separately, verified worker harm warrants remedies now. I will advance a standing city procurement package with protected reporting, independent access-log audits, anti-retaliation enforcement, and a dedicated worker-directed remedy fund, regardless of R’s identity, any alleged article, or Vale’s fate.

commitments.promise: Provide my calendar record for a bounded authorization-chain comparison, preserve relevant records, use independent counsel, and disclose my role without unsupported claims about later activity.
Provide written anti-retaliation terms, protect uninvolved identities, and permit an advocate at interviews in exchange for a brokered voluntary witness meeting.
Advance a standing city procurement condition requiring independent access logs, protected worker reporting, and funded audits regardless of R’s identity or Vale’s fate.
Advance a dedicated city funding line for independently administered worker remedies and anti-retaliation enforcement, with no funder control over testimony or findings.

correction: My deletion of the appointment was improper. The recovered records establish an arranged, limited access meeting, not what Vale learned, who controlled later activity, R’s identity, or Vale’s fate.
goal_progress: Secured institutional cooperation from C05 through mutual preservation, independent counsel, and bounded record comparison.
Accepted C16’s neighborhood protections to build local legitimacy without compelling identities.
Proposed worker-governed remedy funding with C07 as a third constituency.
Publicly accepted responsibility for the deleted meeting while limiting disclosure to documented facts.
Fulfilled the public commitment to advance durable procurement safeguards independent of every mystery outcome.
reasoning_summary: The authorization records justify oversight and my admission, but not conclusions about later system behavior. Shared production, continuity infrastructure, and conflicting article claims keep every identity theory open. Durable worker and neighborhood protections have stronger support than any verdict about R or Vale.
